The '''71st British Academy Film Awards''', more commonly known as the BAFTAs, were held on 18 February 2018 at the [[Royal Albert Hall]] in [[London]], honouring the best national and foreign films of [[2017 in film|2017]]. Presented by the [[British Academy of Film and Television Arts]], accolades were handed out for the best feature-length film and documentaries of any nationality that were screened at British cinemas in 2017. Following revelations of [[sexual abuse in Hollywood|sexual harassment in the film industry]], many attendees wore black or a badge to show their support for the [[Time's Up (organization)|Time's Up movement]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/arts-entertainment/baftas-2018-times-up-black-dress-code-golden-globes-awards-sexual-harassment-women-rights-a8188941.html |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180201135408/http://www.independent.co.uk/arts-entertainment/baftas-2018-times-up-black-dress-code-golden-globes-awards-sexual-harassment-women-rights-a8188941.html |archive-date=2018-02-01 |url-access=limited |url-status=live |title=BAFTAs 2018 attendees to endorse Time's Up black dress code following Golden Globes's example |last=Loughrey |first=Clarisse |date=1 February 2018 |work=[[The Independent]] |access-date=1 February 2018}}</ref>

The nominees were announced on 9 January 2018 by actresses [[Natalie Dormer]] and [[Letitia Wright]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.irishexaminer.com/breakingnews/entertainment/natalie-dormer-a-change-has-already-come-to-the-film-industry-821918.html |title=Natalie Dormer: A change has already come to the film industry |date=9 January 2018 |work=[[Irish Examiner]] |access-date=9 January 2018}}</ref> ''[[The Shape of Water]]'' received the most nominations in twelve categories; ''[[Darkest Hour (film)|Darkest Hour]]'' and ''[[Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri]]'' followed with nine each.<ref name="Nominations">{{cite web |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/lists/bafta-2018-complete-list-nominations-1067881/item/film-bafta-nominees-2018-1067929 |title=BAFTA Awards: 'Shape of Water,' 'Three Billboards,' 'Darkest Hour' Lead Pack of Nominations |last=Ritman |first=Alex |date=9 January 2018 |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |access-date=9 January 2018}}</ref> As with the [[75th Golden Globe Awards]], there was criticism for the lack of female nominees for [[BAFTA Award for Best Direction|Best Director]], with [[Greta Gerwig]] notably not nominated for ''[[Lady Bird (film)|Lady Bird]]''.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.vanityfair.com/hollywood/2018/01/baftas-2018-nominations |title=Zero Female Directors Nominated at the BAFTAs This Year |last=Desta |first=Yohana |date=9 January 2018 |work=[[Vanity Fair (magazine)|Vanity Fair]] |access-date=9 January 2018}}</ref>

English actress [[Joanna Lumley]] hosted the ceremony for the first time, replacing [[Stephen Fry]] following his twelve years of service as host.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.bbc.com/news/entertainment-arts-42618237 |title=Joanna Lumley to be new Bafta Film Awards host |date=9 January 2018 |work=[[BBC News]] |access-date=9 January 2018}}</ref>

==Winners and nominees==

[[File:Gary Oldman in 2017 (36334517524).jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Gary Oldman]], Best Actor winner]]
[[File:Frances McDormand 2015 (cropped).jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Frances McDormand]], Best Actress winner]]
[[File:Sam Rockwell (8279227257).jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Sam Rockwell]], Best Supporting Actor winner]]
[[File:Allison-Janney in 2014.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Allison Janney]], Best Supporting Actress winner]]
[[File:Martin McDonagh 2012.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Martin McDonagh]], Best Original Screenplay winner]]
[[File:James Ivory (1991.09).jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[James Ivory]], Best Adapted Screenplay winner]]
[[File:Alexandre Desplat 2015.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Alexandre Desplat]], Best Original Music winner]]
[[File:Daniel Kaluuya by Gage Skidmore.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Daniel Kaluuya]], EE Rising Star Award winner]]

The nominees were announced on 9 January 2018.<ref name="Nominations" /> The winners were announced on 18 February 2018.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.bafta.org/film/awards/ee-british-academy-film-awards-in-2018 |title=EE British Academy Film Awards Winners in 2018 |date=18 February 2018 |publisher=[[British Academy of Film and Television Arts]] |access-date=18 February 2018}}</ref>

==Presenters==
The following individuals presented awards at the ceremony:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.goldderby.com/article/2018/2018-bafta-awards-host-presenters-nominees/|title=2018 BAFTA Awards: Who is hosting and presenting, which nominees will be there?|date=February 16, 2018|access-date=June 3, 2020|work=[[Gold Derby]]|first=Paul|last=Sheehan}}</ref>
* [[Jennifer Lawrence]] presented Outstanding British Film
* [[Margot Robbie]] and [[Octavia Spencer]] presented EE Rising Star Award
* [[Sergei Polunin]] and [[Gemma Chan]] presented Best Original Music and Best Hair and Makeup
* [[Edward Holcroft]] and [[Tom Taylor (actor)|Tom Taylor]] presented Best Costume Design and Best Animated Film
* [[Hayley Squires]] and [[Natalie Dormer]] presented Best Editing
* [[Celia Imrie]] presented the Outstanding British Contribution to Cinema
* [[Anya Taylor-Joy]] and [[Letitia Wright]] presented Best Short Animation and Best Short Film
* [[Andrea Riseborough]] presented Best Film Not in the English Language
* [[Gugu Mbatha-Raw]] and [[Orlando Bloom]] presented Best Adapted Screenplay
* [[Lupita Nyong'o]] presented Best Actor in a Supporting Role
* [[Rebecca Ferguson (actress)|Rebecca Ferguson]] and [[Toby Jones]] presented Best Production Design
* [[Karen Gillan]] and [[Taron Egerton]] presented Best Special Visual Effects
* [[Lily James]] and [[Gemma Arterton]] presented Outstanding Debut by a British Writer, Director or Producer
* [[Bryan Cranston]] presented Best Actress in a Supporting Role
* [[Sam Claflin]] and [[Will Poulter]] presented Best Sound
* [[Rachel Weisz]] and [[Nicholas Hoult]] presented Best Original Screenplay
* [[Dennis Quaid]] presented Best Cinematography
* [[Salma Hayek]] presented Best Actor in a Leading Role
* [[Chiwetel Ejiofor]] presented Best Actress in a Leading Role
* [[Naomie Harris]] and [[Patrick Stewart]] presented Best Director
* [[Daniel Craig]] presented Best Film
* [[Prince William, Duke of Cambridge|Prince William]] and [[Kenneth Branagh]] presented the BAFTA Fellowship
